semantic.role: Root ESLint flat configuration file for the ArchSpine project, defining recommended lint rules, TypeScript-specific rules, and Prettier integration for all source directories.
responsibilities: Aggregate and export the project-wide ESLint flat config array via tseslint.config.
Include recommended JavaScript lint rules from @eslint/js.
Include recommended TypeScript lint rules from typescript-eslint.
Integrate Prettier formatting rules via eslint-config-prettier to avoid style conflicts.
Scope linting to source code directories (src/services, src/tasks, src/infra, src/engines, src/utils, src/cli, src/types, src/ast, src/core).
Set environment globals to Node.js for all source files.
Define additional rules: enforce consistent type imports, require explicit return types on exported functions, and restrict certain deprecated APIs.
Provide a configuration contract that can be consumed by ESLint CLI or editor integrations.
outOfScope: Testing configuration (separate config files for vitest).
invariants: The configuration must always be a valid ESLint flat config array.
The configuration must always include the Prettier integration as the last element to override conflicting rules.
The configuration must scope lint rules to source directories only, excluding tests and configuration files.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, maintainable ESLint configuration that enforces code quality and consistency across the ArchSpine codebase, leveraging recommended presets and Prettier.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial creation of the ESLint configuration for the v1.0.0 release, incorporating JavaScript, TypeScript, and Prettier standards.

publicSurface.description: The default export is the complete ESLint flat configuration array. External consumers (ESLint CLI, editor plugins) import this to apply linting rules to the ArchSpine source code.
